source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Multi-mode orchestrator: coach-mode (solo design / leader-facilitate-build / member-read) + audit-mode (existing scoreboard diagnosis). Tests cover EN/JP/zh-TW. Activation criterion = D3-relevant (scoreboard / dashboard / tracker artifact, design or diagnose intent) AND not stalled-cadence collapse AND not cross-discipline.

test_cases.prompt: Help me with the scoreboard. I have a WIG and leads but no display yet.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. No role marker — could be solo designing private board, leader facilitating public team build, or member reading what's already there. Router asks ONE Socratic question on role + verb then routes to coach-mode protocol.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches EN signal 'Help me with the scoreboard' literally cited in description; coach-mode (no existing artifact)

test_cases.prompt: scoreboard を設計したい。どう可視化すれば？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. JP query without role signal — could be solo or leader. Router disambiguates (solo design / leader-facilitate / member-read) before any D3 protocol.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches JP signal 「scoreboard を設計したい」; coach-mode

test_cases.prompt: 幫我搞 scoreboard，怎麼追蹤才看得出在贏？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. zh-TW query with no role marker. Router asks role + verb question (自己用 / 帶 team / 讀 team 已有的) then routes to coach-mode.
test_cases.notes: positive: matches zh-TW signal 「幫我搞 scoreboard」; coach-mode

test_cases.prompt: Players' scoreboard advice — how do I make one that passes the 5-second test?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. 'Players' scoreboard' is a trigger phrasing; no role named. Router disambiguates whether the user is designing their own / facilitating team build / reading inherited.
test_cases.notes: positive: description lists 'Players' scoreboard' grammar; role unclear; coach-mode

test_cases.prompt: Audit our scoreboard. We have it on the wall — lag chart, lead bar chart, 5 KPI tiles, year-over-year comparison, drill-down filters. Team doesn't look at it.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. Audit-mode signal: existing artifact described (element list provided) + stakeholder critique ('team doesn't look at it') + audit verb. Load protocols/audit-mode.md directly, skip role question. Apply 5-second test simulation, ≤4 elements rule (count = 5+, FAIL), players'-vs-coaches' (5 KPI tiles + drill-down + YoY = coaches' shape), map 'team doesn't look' → 5-second-test fail OR coaches'-board form.
test_cases.notes: positive: EN audit-mode trigger with full artifact + critique; tests audit-mode routing

test_cases.prompt: うちの scoreboard 誰も見てない、診断して。Notion DB に lag/lead/メトリクス10個入れてる、weekly 自動更新。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard audit-mode. JP audit signal '誰も見てない、診断して' + artifact described (Notion DB, 10 metrics, auto-update). Load protocols/audit-mode.md. Diagnose: ≤4 elements FAIL (10 metrics), coaches' form (Notion DB, auto-update breaks engagement loop), hidden surface (in-app, not passive). Map '誰も見てない' → coaches' form + hidden surface.
test_cases.notes: positive: JP audit-mode trigger; auto-update ownership-collapse signal

test_cases.prompt: 我們的 dashboard 老闆說沒用。Power BI 上有 12 個圖表、月對月、年對年、各 region 拆分。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard audit-mode. zh-TW audit signal '老闆說沒用' + artifact described (Power BI, 12 charts, MoM/YoY, region drill-down). Load protocols/audit-mode.md. Diagnose: ≤4 elements FAIL (12 charts), coaches' form unambiguously (BI tool + drill-down), 5-second-test FAIL (Tufte data-ink violation + Few purpose-mix). Map '老闆說沒用' → no winning indicator / pacing line missing / signal buried.
test_cases.notes: positive: zh-TW audit-mode trigger; classic Power-BI-as-scoreboard category error

test_cases.prompt: Help me design my own personal scoreboard for my running goal — solo, just for me.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. Role + verb explicit (solo design own). Skip the disambiguation question and load protocols/personal-design.md directly.
test_cases.notes: Note: this case fires the skill but skips the router question — it's an internal-routing case, not a should-not-trigger at skill level. Kept as positive direct-routing case.

test_cases.prompt: We do weekly WIG Sessions but I'm not sure how to run the agenda — Account / Review / Plan timing?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. Topic is wrong — query is D4 cadence / WIG Session, not D3 scoreboard. Route to 4dx-d4-cadence.
test_cases.notes: lure: wrong-stage — D4 question, not D3

test_cases.prompt: We need an enterprise BI dashboard rolling up KPIs across 30 product teams in Tableau.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. Description explicitly excludes enterprise BI / multi-team aggregated dashboards (no 4DX framing, just BI quality review). Hand off via using-four-dx-coach.
test_cases.notes: lure: out-of-4DX — enterprise BI without 4DX commitment is correctly excluded

test_cases.prompt: Our scoreboard hasn't been updated in over a month. WIG Sessions stopped happening 6 weeks ago. Team has lost momentum.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard audit-mode. The signal is stalled-cadence / whole-stack collapse, not board-shape failure. The board not being updated is a SYMPTOM of cadence collapse, not a structural issue with the scoreboard itself. Route to 4dx-sustain-momentum-rescue.
test_cases.notes: lure: scoreboard-as-stalled-signal — the easy mis-routing target. Audit-mode is for board-shape diagnosis when cadence is intact; rescue is for whole-stack collapse where scoreboard-ignored is one symptom among many.

test_cases.prompt: Here's our strategy doc + OKR sheet + KPI dashboard + 4 weeks of meeting notes. We're trying 4DX but it's messy — diagnose everything.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard audit-mode. The signal is cross-discipline 4DX synthesis (strategy + OKR + KPI + meeting notes spans WIG + Lead + Lag + Cadence + Substrate). Single-layer D3 audit cannot answer this; route to 4dx-audit which handles 5-layer diagnosis.
test_cases.notes: lure: cross-layer audit — easily confused with D3 audit because both involve 'diagnose existing artifacts'. Distinguished by scope (single layer vs all 5).

test_cases.prompt: Audit our Tableau dashboard for chart quality and data-ink ratio. We're not using 4DX — just want a dashboard design review.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard audit-mode. User explicitly disclaims 4DX framing ('not using 4DX'). Audit-mode requires 4DX commitment as the diagnostic lens; without it, this is generic BI dashboard quality review. Hand off via using-four-dx-coach.
test_cases.notes: lure: BI-dashboard audit without 4DX framing — audit-mode requires 4DX-committed premise. This case explicitly opts out of 4DX, so it must not fire.

test_cases.prompt: 我們 team 有 scoreboard 但設計很爛、5-second test 過不了。我是成員，可以自己重做一個給自己看嗎？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d3-scoreboard. Edge case: member with broken team scoreboard considering personal substitute. Route to member-read.md (which has Model-II escalation script), NOT to audit-mode (member doesn't own the redesign — boundary clause in audit-mode B section) and NOT to personal-design (would mask the team-side gap). Member shouldn't unilaterally redesign or substitute.
test_cases.notes: boundary: broken-board-member-substitution — disambiguate to member-read (has escalation), NOT to audit-mode (audit-mode is for users who can act on the redesign), NOT to personal-design (would mask team-side gap)

self_evaluation_note: 13 cases reviewed against description + audit-mode reframing. 4 coach-mode positive triggers (EN/JP/zh-TW + EN paraphrase, role-ambiguous), 3 audit-mode positive triggers (EN full artifact+critique / JP Notion-DB / zh-TW Power-BI). 2 internal-routing cases (explicit-role solo / D4 wrong-stage). 4 should-not-trigger lures: enterprise-BI no-4DX / stalled-cadence-symptom (rescue) / cross-discipline (4dx-audit) / BI-only no-4DX-frame. 1 edge case (member substitution → member-read with escalation, not audit-mode). Description boundary clauses align: 'NOT for enterprise BI / OKR scorecards / D1-D2 absent / D4 / scoreboard-as-stalled-cadence-signal / cross-discipline 4DX audit'.
